content.text: The Legislative Assembly shall comprise a Speaker, eighteen elected members representing such electoral districts as may be prescribed by law, and, as ex officio members, the Deputy Governor and the Attorney General.
The number of elected members may be increased from time to time in accordance with the recommendations of an Electoral Boundary Commission.

amendmentHistory.description: Amended by the Cayman Islands Constitution (Amendment) Order 2020; "Legislative Assembly" renamed to "Parliament" throughout the Constitution
